title: Paediatric Staff Nurse
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a friendly, reliable and experienced Paediatric Staff Nurse to join our growing team at Petite Practice.

As a paediatric Staff Nurse, you play a vital role in supporting our doctors to ensure reliable direct patient care and a positive patient experience, especially for children and families.

What You’ll Be Doing

  • Assisting with patient registration, appointment scheduling and billing

  • Performing clinic triage

  • Preparing consultation rooms and maintaining clinic cleanliness

  • Competence in performing paediatric clinical procedures such as swabs, suction, nebulization, urine tests, dressings, skin prick tests, vaccination, blood taking in infants and children

  • Providing thorough counselling and patient education.

  • Managing inventory and restocking supplies

  • Ensuring patient confidentiality and accurate nursing documentation and record keeping

  • Supporting smooth day-to-day clinic operations

  • Following clinic safety, infection control and HR policies

What We’re Looking For

  • Caring and professional attitude

  • Comfortable working with infants, children and families

  • Good communication and interpersonal skills

  • Reliable, punctual and responsible

  • Able to multitask in a fast-paced clinic environment

  • Willingness to learn and take initiative

  • Basic computer skills (clinic system training provided)

  • Prior clinic experience is an advantage but not required

What We Offer

At Petite Practice, we believe in taking care of our team as much as our patients.

  • Competitive salary

  • Supportive and respectful work environment

  • Training and on-the-job learning provided

  • Opportunity to grow within a paediatric clinic setting

  • Stable working environment with caring colleagues

About Us

Petite Practice is a paediatric and family-centred clinic dedicated to providing compassionate, high-quality care in a warm and welcoming environment. We value professionalism, teamwork, and continuous improvement both in patient care and staff development.

postedCompany.description:
Petite Practice is a bespoke paediatric clinic in Singapore that is tailored to meet the individual needs of children and their families.
We understand that a visit to the doctor can be intimidating for children. That’s why we’re committed to providing holistic, quality medical care and attention to our little ones in a calm and friendly environment. You can rest assured that your visit to Petite Practice will be positive and pleasant.
Our dedicated paediatricians in Singapore have varied subspecialty training and interests to meet your child’s specific needs and are well-versed in treating general paediatric conditions.
Petite Practice’s paediatrician provides comprehensive paediatric care, including vaccinations, management of common childhood illnesses, and allergy identification services.
postedCompany.name: PIXIE DUST PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D15 Katong, Joo Chiat, Amber Road
